title: Polymarket Opens $5T Private Market Betting to Everyone
summary: Polymarket now lets everyday traders bet on startup milestones, a market previously limited to Wall Street insiders. This could democratize access to high-stakes private company predictions.
body:
Polymarket, a decentralized prediction market platform, has launched a new feature allowing retail traders to bet on milestones of private companies. This market, previously dominated by Wall Street insiders, is valued at $5 trillion.

The new markets will focus on events like funding rounds, IPOs, and acquisitions of private startups. Polymarket's platform uses blockchain technology to ensure transparency and fairness in betting outcomes. This move could level the playing field for retail traders who previously lacked access to such high-stakes predictions.

For everyday people, this means the opportunity to participate in markets that were once reserved for the financial elite. It could also provide a new way to gain insights into the performance and future prospects of private companies. However, it's important to note that betting on private company milestones carries significant risks.

To get started, users can visit Polymarket's platform and explore the available markets. It's crucial to understand the risks involved and only bet what you can afford to lose. Keep an eye on the platform for new markets as they become available.
